description_long: This is a pair of standard scissors featuring two sharp, metallic blades joined by a central pivot. The handles are made of black plastic, ergonomically shaped with one loop larger than the other to accommodate different finger sizes. The blades are straight and taper to a pointed tip, suitable for precision cutting tasks. The pivot joint is visible and appears to be a metal rivet, providing a secure and smooth opening and closing action. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible brand markings or decorative elements. The scissors are typical of those found in offices, schools, or home toolkits, and are sized for handheld use.
description: A pair of black-handled, metal-bladed scissors with ergonomic loops and a pointed tip, joined by a visible metal rivet. The design is practical and unbranded, suitable for everyday cutting tasks.
description_view_0: The scissors are seen at an angle, highlighting the length of the blades and the ergonomic black handles.
description_view_1: A clear side view showing both handles and the full length of the blades, with the pivot joint visible.
description_view_2: A top-down view emphasizing the finger loops and the short width of the blades.
description_view_3: A mirrored side view, showing the opposite side of the handles and blades, with the same ergonomic features.
attribute_handle_type: Asymmetrical, ergonomic plastic handles with a smooth finish, designed for right-handed use, not padded or coated.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible metal rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard fixed pivot.
attribute_finger_loop_design: One large oval loop and one smaller oval loop, both smooth and untextured, accommodating thumb and multiple fingers.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips, designed for precision cutting.
